en: Speakers of some languages may have difficulty telling the difference between this sound, the short vowel e, and another sound, the short vowel i.
ko: 일부 언어 사용자들은 단모음 e와 단모음 i의 차이를 구별하기 어려울 수 있습니다.
ja: 一部の言語の話者は、この音、短母音のeと、もう一つの音、短母音のiの違いを聞き分けるのが難しいかもしれません。
zhTW: 某些語言的使用者可能很難分辨這個音（短母音e）和另一個音（短母音i）的差別。
vi: Nguoi noi mot so ngon ngu co the gap kho khan trong viec phan biet am nay, nguyen am ngan e, va mot am khac, nguyen am ngan i.

en: Listen carefully to hear the difference. In each example, I'll say the word with the short vowel e first. bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin Now you try.
ko: 차이를 잘 들어보세요. 각 예시에서 단모음 e 단어를 먼저 말할게요. bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin 이제 따라 해보세요.
ja: よく聞いて違いを確認してください。それぞれの例で、短母音eの単語を先に言います。bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin では、やってみてください。
zhTW: 仔細聽辨差異。每個例子中，我會先說含短母音e的單詞。bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin 現在換你試試。
vi: Hay nghe can than de nhan ra su khac biet. Trong moi vi du, toi se noi tu co nguyen am ngan e truoc. bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin Bay gio ban thu xem.

en: Listen carefully and repeat after me. bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin Good!
ko: 잘 듣고 따라 하세요. bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin 잘했어요!
ja: よく聞いて、私の後に繰り返してください。bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin よくできました！
zhTW: 仔細聽，跟著我複誦。bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin 做得好！
vi: Hay lang nghe va nhac lai theo toi. bed bid medal middle dead did fell fill pen pin Gioi lam!
